type.title: Result type
type.description: The type of YouTube search result, such as Video, Channel, Playlist, Movie, or another result type returned by YouTube.

id.title: Result ID
id.description: The YouTube identifier for the result, such as a video ID, channel ID, or playlist ID.

title.title: Title
title.description: The title of the YouTube search result.
title.example: JavaScript Course for Beginners - Your First Step to Web Development

description.title: Description
description.description: The result description or snippet returned by YouTube.
description.example: Learn JavaScript basics with this quick, beginner-friendly course...

thumbnail.title: Thumbnail
thumbnail.description: The main thumbnail image URL for the search result.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The display duration for video results.

viewCount.title: View count
viewCount.description: The view count text returned by YouTube.

publishedTime.title: Published time
publishedTime.description: The relative publish time returned by YouTube.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Channel metadata for the result when available.

name.title: Channel name
name.description: The display name of the channel.

verified.title: Verified channel
verified.description: Whether YouTube marks the channel as verified.

isVerifiedArtist.title: Verified artist
isVerifiedArtist.description: Whether YouTube marks the channel as a verified artist.

url.title: Channel URL
url.description: The YouTube channel URL when provided.

badges.title: Badges
badges.description: Labels or badges attached to the search result, such as CC or other YouTube result markers.

isLive.title: Is live
isLive.description: Whether the result is currently live.

isShort.title: Is Short
isShort.description: Whether the result is a YouTube Short.

isPremium.title: Is Premium
isPremium.description: Whether the result is marked as YouTube Premium content.

expandableMetadata.title: Expandable metadata
expandableMetadata.description: Additional metadata returned by YouTube, such as chapter summaries or expandable result details.

example.title: Intro | 1 JavaScript Basics | 2 Numbers and Math
example.label: 27 chapters
